description: Bring a touch of Oz to every day with this officially licensed Wicked backpack for girls, designed to blend Broadway style with everyday function. Featuring a striking black background adorned with a repeat pattern of the Wicked logo in vibrant pink and green, this school bag for girls is as eye-catching as it is practical. The standout feature? A zipped front pocket showing off the magical silhouettes of Glinda and Elphaba, split between a pink and green colour block design that captures the essence of their story. Whether it’s for school, travel, or weekend outings, this children's backpacks built from 100% Polyester, making it a perfect girls backpack for school as it’s strong enough to handle all the books, snacks, and sparkle a girl could need. Perfect as a kids school bag, girls rucksack, or even a wicked travel bag, it’s a go-to choice for school bags for girls who love bold fashion with a theatrical twist. Whether it’s for back to school, a summer trip, or a winter show, this Wicked bag is ready to go wherever the magic takes you. Looking for kids gifts, girls gifts, or unique birthday gifts for girls? This Wicked merchandise item is a surefire hit. A top pick for fans of the musical, it also makes one of the most charming wicked toys and wicked gifts around.
